title: pyrus evansii
intro: Pyrus evansii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the Evans' pear. It is native to the southwestern regions of China. The medicinal properties of Pyrus evansii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its fruit, leaves, and bark. The health benefits of Pyrus evansii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
